历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 29946 → 30557 → 44515 → 43562 → 36724. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 30,000, dropped significantly to 44515 in 2023, slightly recovered to 43562 in 2024, and notably moved forward to 36724 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past three years is about 36724–44515, with a baseline ranking of approximately 36724 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu was 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, sharply dropped to 5 in 2024, and further decreased to 4 in 2025. In 2026, the plan for Physics Category significantly increased to 15 (plus 1 for Rehabilitation Physical Therapy classified under Medical Category but actually Physics Category with Chemistry as a re-selection, totaling about 16), an expansion of about 275% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition pressure, which is the most important factor affecting rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, showing a slight rise but overall in the middle-to-lower tier, with stable positioning. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the home fan controversy during the CUVA Volleyball Finals. Douyin popularity ranks 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure, indicating strong attention from applicants. No historical enrollment gaps have been recorded. Among the Physics Category majors, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Intelligent Sports Engineering, Sports Rehabilitation, and Applied Psychology have moderate correlation with sports science, while Sports Human Science and Rehabilitation Physical Therapy intersect with sports science/medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology (Computer Category) has high social popularity, while Intelligent Sports Engineering and Sports Rehabilitation are emerging majors with rising popularity; Applied Psychology remains stable. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu is estimated at about 380,000 based on a recent proportion of about 73%, an increase of about 46% compared to 260,587 in 2025, intensifying competition. Compared to 2024 (462/516), there is a slight increase, reflecting a slight overall increase in competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 36724 in 2025, the major positive factor of the Physics Category plan expanding from 4 to about 16 in 2026 (+275%), the competition intensification effect of a 46% increase in local Physics Category examinees compared to 2025, and the slight negative reputation suppressing heat, the expansion effect far outweighs the increase in examinees and negative reputation. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly drop to about 96819, with a range of 96319–97319.

历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Beijing Sport University's medical category (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in Jiangsu Province over the past five years are: 2021: 29,196 (planned 1 student), 2022: 32,307 (planned 2 students), 2023: 49,755 (planned 2 students), 2024: 35,656 (planned 1 student), 2025: 35,803 (planned 1 student). In 2024, it contracted back to 1 student, and the ranking quickly rebounded to 35,656. In 2025, it remained basically flat at 35,803. The 2026 enrollment plan is still 1 student, consistent with 2025, and the supply-demand relationship has not undergone structural changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed in the national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction universities. It is the highest institution of sports higher education in China. Although not a 985 university, it has deep disciplinary accumulation in the field of sports health. The Rehabilitation Physical Therapy major relies on the university's advantages in sports medicine and rehabilitation disciplines, featuring distinct industry characteristics and high social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Rehabilitation Physical Therapy is a popular major in the medical technology category. In recent years, with the advancement of the Healthy China strategy and the growth of rehabilitation medical demand, the popularity of applying for this major has continued to rise. This major only has 1 slot in Jiangsu Province, making it a scarce enrollment with relatively fierce competition. The university is located in Beijing, and the regional advantage of a first-tier city has a strong appeal to candidates.

预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the minimum admission ranking for the medical category in 2026 is expected to be 36,003, a slight increase from 2025 (the ranking number increases, admission difficulty slightly increases), with a fluctuation range of 35,503 to 36,503.
